title: malaxis lyonnetii
intro: Malaxis lyonnetii, also known as Lyonnet's malaxis, is a species of orchid native to Central and South America. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Malaxis lyonnetii include treating wounds, infections, and skin conditions, as well as reducing fever and relieving pain. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, although it may also be found in herbal supplement form or used externally as a poultice or ointment.
